intro.title: Introduction
intro.body: Orbit is a personal habit tracking app. We take your privacy seriously and are committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains what data we store, how we use it, and your rights under the LGPD (Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados) and equivalent data-protection laws.

controller.title: Who Controls Your Data
controller.body: The data controller is TL SOFTWARE ENGINEERING LTDA (CNPJ 58.429.979/0001-06), the company that operates Orbit. For privacy requests or questions, contact our data protection lead at contact@useorbit.org.

dataCollected.title: Data We Store
dataCollected.account: Account information: name and email address (via email signup or Google OAuth)
dataCollected.habits: Habit data: habits you create, completion logs, schedules, tags, and goals
dataCollected.chat: AI chat messages: conversations with the Orbit AI assistant
dataCollected.preferences: Preferences: language, timezone, color scheme, notification settings, and AI memory facts you provide

howWeUse.title: How We Use Your Data
howWeUse.provide: To provide and operate the Orbit service
howWeUse.personalize: To personalize your experience with AI-powered insights and summaries
howWeUse.notifications: To send push notifications and habit reminders you have configured

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.intro: We use the following services to operate Orbit:
thirdParty.firebase: Firebase Cloud Messaging - for push notifications
thirdParty.openai: OpenAI - for AI chat features and daily summaries

noSell.title: We Do Not Sell Your Data
noSell.body: Your data is not sold to third parties and is not used to train AI models. Your habit data and conversations are used solely to provide you with the Orbit service.

security.title: Data Security
security.body: All connections to Orbit use HTTPS encryption. Authentication uses rotating refresh sessions. Payment information is handled entirely by Stripe and never touches our servers.

retention.title: How Long We Keep Your Data
retention.intro: We retain your data only as long as needed to provide the service:
retention.account: Account data: kept for as long as your account is active.
retention.sessions: Authentication sessions and push tokens: kept while active and removed on logout, token expiry, or device unsubscribe.
retention.ai: AI chat history and memory facts: kept while AI features are enabled; deleting your account or clearing AI memory removes them.
retention.afterDeletion: After account deletion or the 7-day grace period, your personal data is permanently erased except where the law requires us to retain limited records.

googleScopes.title: Google Account & Calendar Access
googleScopes.intro: If you connect Google, we request only the scopes needed for the features you use:
googleScopes.auth: Basic profile and email, to create and identify your account.
googleScopes.calendar: Read access to your Google Calendar events, used solely to show events alongside your habits and to suggest imports.
googleScopes.control: We never expose raw Google event payloads to the AI, and you can disconnect Google at any time, which deletes the stored access and refresh tokens.

dataResidency.title: Where Your Data Is Stored
dataResidency.body: Orbit's database and application servers are hosted with Supabase and Render. Some subprocessors (such as OpenAI, Stripe, and Google) may process data outside Brazil. International transfers rely on adequacy decisions or standard contractual clauses, consistent with LGPD Chapter V.

automatedProcessing.title: AI & Automated Processing
automatedProcessing.body: Orbit's AI assistant, Astra, processes your habit and chat data to generate summaries, retrospectives, and suggestions. This is assistive only and does not make legally significant decisions about you. You can disable AI memory and AI summaries at any time in AI Settings, and you may object to automated processing by contacting us.

minors.title: Age Requirement
minors.body: Orbit is not directed to children. You must be at least 13 years old to create an account. If we learn that we have collected data from a child under 13 without appropriate consent, we will delete it.

export.title: Your Right to Export Your Data
export.body: You can download a copy of all your Orbit data (habits, logs, goals, tags, AI memory facts, and settings) as a JSON file from the Profile page, in line with your data-portability rights under LGPD Art. 18.

deletion.title: Data Deletion
deletion.body: You can delete your account and all associated data at any time from the Profile page in the app. The process requires email confirmation:
deletion.step1: 1. Go to Profile and tap "Delete account"
deletion.step2: 2. A confirmation code will be sent to your email
deletion.step3: 3. Enter the code to confirm deletion
deletion.step4: All data is permanently deleted immediately, including habits, completion history, AI conversations, user facts, and settings. This action is irreversible.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: If you have questions about this privacy policy or your data, contact us at contact@useorbit.org.

retrospective.empty: Choose a time period and generate a retrospective to see Astra's insights on your habits.

meetAstra.title: Meet Astra.
meetAstra.subtitle: Orbit's assistant. It can create habits, recap your day, plan ahead, and reflect on what's drifting. Ask plainly. It listens.

welcome.title: Welcome to Orbit
welcome.subtitle: Let's set up your experience and create your first habit.

createHabit.title: Create your first habit
createHabit.subtitle: Habits are the building blocks. What do you want to track?

completeHabit.title: Now complete it
completeHabit.instruction: Tap the circle to mark it done

createGoal.title: Set a goal
createGoal.subtitle: Goals give your habits a bigger purpose.

chat.title: AI Chat
chat.desc: Ask AI to create habits, get insights, or analyze your progress.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.desc: See your completion history with a color-coded heatmap.

achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.desc: Earn XP, level up, and unlock badges as you build streaks.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.desc: Get reminded before habits are due.

complete.title: You're all set!
complete.subtitle: Everything is real -- your habit and progress are already saved.

wizard.calendarDescription: Already have events in Google Calendar? Import them as habits in Orbit with one tap.

habitsSection.creatingDesc: Tap the + button at the bottom of the screen, or ask the AI in chat. Set a name, optional description, and frequency schedule (daily, weekly on specific days, monthly, or yearly).
habitsSection.frequenciesDesc: Habits can repeat daily, weekly on specific days, monthly, or yearly. You can also create one-time tasks with no frequency. The app shows only habits scheduled for each day.
habitsSection.subHabitsDesc: Break down complex habits into smaller steps. For example, 'Morning Routine' can have 'Meditate', 'Journal', and 'Stretch' as sub-habits. Each can be completed independently.
habitsSection.checklistsDesc: Add a checklist to any habit for simple item lists like shopping, packing, or to-do breakdowns. Check items off in the detail view. For recurring habits, the checklist automatically resets when you log the habit. You can also save checklists as reusable templates.
habitsSection.loggingDesc: Tap the circle next to any habit to mark it as done. Tap again to undo. You can also log habits through the AI chat by saying things like 'I ran today'.
habitsSection.badHabitsDesc: Track habits you want to stop (smoking, nail biting, etc.). Log each slip-up to build awareness. Your streak counts days without the bad habit.
habitsSection.slipAlertsDesc: Enable slip alerts on bad habits to receive AI-generated motivational notifications before your usual slip times. The system detects day and time patterns from your logs and sends personalized nudges to help you stay strong.
habitsSection.metricsDesc: Each habit tracks your current streak, best streak, weekly and monthly completion rates, and total completions. Tap a habit to see its full stats.
habitsSection.dragDropDesc: Press and hold any habit card to drag it into your preferred order. Your custom order is saved automatically.
habitsSection.bulkSelectDesc: Tap 'Select' to enter selection mode. Choose multiple habits to log, skip, or delete them at once.
habitsSection.filteringDesc: Use the search bar to find habits by name. Filter by frequency (daily, weekly, monthly, yearly, one-time) using the chips below the search bar.
habitsSection.summaryDesc: When enabled in Settings, an AI-generated summary card appears at the top of your Today view with insights about your day and motivational nudges.
habitsSection.remindersDesc: Add reminders to any habit. Habits with a due time get relative reminders (e.g. 15 min before). Habits without a due time get scheduled reminders at specific times on the same day or day before. You'll receive a push notification for each reminder.
habitsSection.oneTimeTasksDesc: Create tasks without a recurring frequency for single-date goals. Perfect for things like 'buy groceries tomorrow' or 'dentist appointment Friday'.
habitsSection.duplicateDesc: Long-press a habit card or use its menu to duplicate it with all settings (frequency, tags, reminders). Great for creating similar habits quickly.
habitsSection.dateNavDesc: Use the left and right arrows on the Today view to navigate between days. The Today view also shows any overdue habits that still need attention.
habitsSection.endDatesDesc: Set an optional end date on recurring habits. The habit stops appearing in your schedule after the end date passes, perfect for time-limited challenges or temporary routines.
habitsSection.goalLinkingDesc: Link habits to your goals from the habit form. Linked habits contribute to goal adherence tracking, helping you see how your daily actions drive progress toward bigger objectives.
habitsSection.tagDisplayDesc: Tags you assign to habits appear as color-coded badges directly on habit cards. Quickly identify categories at a glance without opening each habit.
habitsSection.retrospectiveDesc: Pro feature. Access from your Profile to generate AI-powered retrospectives that analyze your habit data over configurable time periods (week, month, quarter, year). See highlights, missed opportunities, trends, and actionable suggestions.
habitsSection.flexibleDesc: Complete X times per week or month at your own pace -- no specific days required. Flexible habits track how many times you complete them within a window, giving you freedom to choose when.
habitsSection.generalDesc: Habits without a schedule -- always visible, no due dates. Perfect for ongoing habits like journaling or reading that you want to track without being tied to specific days. Enable 'Show general on Today' in Settings.
habitsSection.skipDesc: Skip marks a habit as intentionally skipped for the day without breaking your streak. Use it when you consciously chose not to do a habit (rest day, travel, etc.) rather than simply forgetting.

goalsSection.creatingDesc: Create goals with a title, target value, unit, and optional deadline. Goals give your habits a bigger purpose and help you measure long-term progress.
goalsSection.trackingDesc: Update your current value, add notes, and see your full progress history. Each update moves you closer to your target.
goalsSection.linkingDesc: Connect habits to goals for adherence tracking. See how consistently you follow through on the habits that matter most for each goal.
goalsSection.dashboardDesc: View velocity, projected completion date, and tracking status (on track, at risk, or behind) for each goal. Data-driven insight into your progress.
goalsSection.aiReviewDesc: Get AI-generated reviews of your goal progress with analysis of what's working, what needs attention, and suggestions for staying on track.
goalsSection.statusDesc: Goals move through active, completed, and abandoned states. Mark goals as completed when you hit your target, or abandon them if priorities change.

chatSection.canDoDesc: Tell the AI what habits you want and it creates them. Say 'I ran today' to log completions. It can create one-time tasks too, like 'buy eggs tomorrow'.
chatSection.manageDesc: Ask the AI to modify habits: 'move my gym to tomorrow', 'rename running to jogging', 'change meditation to weekly', or 'delete my reading habit'. It can handle bulk operations too.
chatSection.insightsDesc: Ask 'how am I doing?' and the AI analyzes your real streaks, completion rates, and trends. It can give weekly reviews, suggest improvements, and celebrate your progress.
chatSection.imageDesc: Send a photo of a schedule, to-do list, or calendar and the AI extracts habits from it. It suggests them for your review before creating anything.
chatSection.voiceDesc: Tap the microphone icon to speak instead of type. Choose your language from the flag picker next to the mic. Supports multiple languages.
chatSection.cannotDoDesc: The AI is focused on habits and routines. It can't answer general knowledge questions, help with homework, or do things unrelated to your habits.
chatSection.tipsDesc: The AI remembers your conversation, so you can say 'modify the previous suggestion' or 'change TestA to weekly'. It also knows your streaks and stats, so ask for honest feedback!
chatSection.reschedulingDesc: Ask the AI to analyze your schedule and suggest better times or days for your habits. It considers your existing routine to find optimal slots.

calendarSection.colorsDesc: Green means all habits completed for that day. Orange means you missed some habits. Purple means habits are upcoming (today or future). Each day with habits shows a small dot indicator.
calendarSection.dayDetailsDesc: Tap any day on the calendar to see which habits were scheduled and their completion status.
calendarSection.navigationDesc: Use the arrows to move between months. Tap the search icon to jump back to the current month.
calendarSection.streaksDesc: The calendar shows your completion patterns over time. Use it to identify consistency gaps and see which days you tend to miss, so you can adjust your routine.
calendarSection.googleCalendarDesc: Import events from your Google Calendar as one-time habits. Sync your schedule to Orbit so meetings, appointments, and events automatically appear as tasks on the right day.

settingsSection.colorSchemeDesc: Choose from 6 accent colors (purple, blue, green, rose, orange, cyan). The entire app adapts -- backgrounds, buttons, shadows, and the AI chat orb all change to match.
settingsSection.languageDesc: Switch between English and Portuguese. The app, AI responses, and emails all adapt to your chosen language.
settingsSection.aiMemoryDesc: When enabled, the AI learns from your conversations -- your preferences, routines, and goals. It uses this to give more personalized suggestions. You can view and manage what it knows in 'What Orbit Knows'.
settingsSection.aiSummaryDesc: Enables a daily AI-generated summary card on your Today page with insights about your habits and motivational nudges.
settingsSection.userFactsDesc: Manually add facts about yourself (preferences, routines, context) that the AI uses to personalize its suggestions. For example: 'I work night shifts' or 'I prefer outdoor exercise'.
settingsSection.timezoneDesc: Your timezone is auto-detected on first login. It determines when habits are due and what 'today' means for your schedule.
settingsSection.supportDesc: Have a question, found a bug, or want to share feedback? Use the Support page (accessible from your Profile) to send us a message.
settingsSection.pushNotificationsDesc: Enable or disable push notifications in Settings. Use the 'Send test notification' button to verify they work. Reminders are sent as push notifications based on each habit's due time.
settingsSection.subscriptionDesc: The free tier includes up to 10 habits and 20 AI messages per month. Orbit Pro unlocks unlimited habits, 500 AI messages, daily summaries, sub-habits, and all color schemes.
settingsSection.retrospectiveDesc: Pro feature accessible from your Profile. Generates AI-powered analysis of your habits over configurable time periods (week, month, quarter, year). See what went well, what was missed, trends, and actionable suggestions.
settingsSection.weekStartDayDesc: Choose whether your week starts on Monday or Sunday. This affects all calendars, day pickers, and weekly frequency displays throughout the app.
settingsSection.referralDesc: Share your unique referral code to invite friends to Orbit. Find your code in your Profile page and help grow the community.
settingsSection.gamificationDesc: Pro feature. Earn XP for completing habits and goals. Level up, unlock achievement badges, and track your progress on the Achievements page accessible from your Profile.
settingsSection.widgetDesc: Add the Orbit widget to your Android home screen to see today's habits at a glance. It shows completion status, due times, and checklist progress. When nothing is scheduled for today, it automatically shows tomorrow's habits instead.
settingsSection.showGeneralTodayDesc: Toggle to show general habits (habits without a schedule) on your Today view. When enabled, they appear in a separate section below your scheduled habits.

notificationsSection.bellDesc: Access your notifications from the bell icon on the habits page. A badge shows your unread count so you never miss a reminder.
notificationsSection.managingDesc: Mark notifications as read, or delete them individually. Use 'Mark all read' or 'Delete all' for bulk actions. Notifications are created when habit reminders fire.
notificationsSection.configuringRemindersDesc: Set reminders in the habit edit form. Choose a time before the habit's due time -- at the due time, or minutes, hours, or up to 1 day before. You can add multiple reminders per habit.

upgrade.title: Upgrade to Pro
upgrade.manageHint: Manage your subscription, update payment, or cancel anytime

habits.label: Habits
habits.tooltip: Create and track daily, weekly, or monthly habits. Free users can have up to 10 active habits.

ai.label: AI Chat
ai.tooltip: Chat with an AI coach that can create habits, log completions, analyze progress, suggest breakdowns, and offer personalized advice.

subHabits.label: Sub-habits
subHabits.tooltip: Break complex habits into smaller steps. Sub-habits nest under a parent habit for better organization.

goals.label: Goals
goals.tooltip: Create long-term goals and link habits to track measurable progress over time.

colors.label: Color Schemes
colors.tooltip: Personalize Orbit with 6 color schemes: purple, blue, green, rose, orange, and cyan. Free users get the default purple theme.

premiumColors.label: Premium Colors
premiumColors.tooltip: Unlock all premium color themes and customize Orbit beyond the default free scheme.

aiMemory.label: AI Memory
aiMemory.tooltip: The AI remembers your preferences, goals, and context across conversations for more personalized coaching.

summary.label: Daily Summary
summary.tooltip: Get an AI-generated daily overview of your habits, streaks, and what needs attention today.

apiKeys.label: API Keys
apiKeys.tooltip: Create API keys to connect Orbit with developer tools and external MCP integrations.

retrospective.label: Retrospective
retrospective.tooltip: AI analyzes your habit data over weeks, months, or quarters to surface patterns, wins, and areas for improvement.

achievements.label: Achievements & XP
achievements.tooltip: Earn XP for completing habits, level up, and unlock achievements that celebrate your consistency and milestones.

slipAlerts.label: Slip Alerts
slipAlerts.tooltip: For bad habits, AI detects your slip patterns and sends motivational notifications before your usual slip times.

calendarImport.label: Google Calendar
calendarImport.tooltip: Import events from Google Calendar as habits with one tap. Keep your routines and calendar in sync.

adFree.label: Ad-free experience
adFree.tooltip: Remove all ads from the mobile app for a distraction-free habit tracking experience.

actions.manageHint: Change plan, update payment method, or cancel
actions.managePlayHint: Your subscription is billed through Google Play. Manage or cancel it there.

playError.unavailable: Google Play billing isn't available on this device.

playError.deviceNotSupported: This device doesn't support Google Play billing.
playError.pending: Your purchase is pending. We'll unlock Pro once it's confirmed.
playError.notSignedIn: Please sign in again before purchasing.
playError.nothingToRestore: No previous purchase found to restore.

goals.emptyHint: Create your first goal to start tracking progress

form.deadlineInPast: This deadline is in the past.
form.progressExceedsTarget: Value exceeds the target. It will be capped at 100%.
form.titleTooLong: Title must be 200 characters or fewer
form.unitTooLong: Unit must be 50 characters or fewer
form.habitLimit: You can link up to 20 habits
form.progressValueInvalid: Enter a value of 0 or higher
form.typeStandardDescription: Track a measurable target step by step. Update progress manually or link habits that count toward it.
form.typeStreakHintGood: Link a habit: streak grows each day you complete it. Miss a day and it resets to zero.
form.typeStreakHintBad: Link a bad habit: streak grows each day you resist. Log a slip and it resets to zero.

detail.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this goal? This cannot be undone.
detail.loadError: Could not load full details. Showing cached data.
detail.askAstraDefault: Want a weekly check-in plan for this?

profileCard.title: Achievements & Level
profileCard.hint: Track your progress and unlock achievements

page.lockedDescription: Upgrade to Pro to track your progress, earn XP, and unlock achievements.

week_warrior.name: Week Warrior
week_warrior.description: Achieve a 7-day streak on any habit

perfect_day.name: Perfect Day
perfect_day.description: Complete all habits in a day

perfect_week.name: Perfect Week
perfect_week.description: Complete all habits for 7 consecutive days

perfect_month.name: Perfect Month
perfect_month.description: Complete all habits for 30 consecutive days

early_bird.name: Early Bird
early_bird.description: Complete a habit before 7 AM (10 times)

night_owl.name: Night Owl
night_owl.description: Complete a habit after 10 PM (10 times)

bad_habit_breaker.name: Bad Habit Breaker
bad_habit_breaker.description: Achieve a 30-day streak on a bad habit

errors.validation: Please check your input and try again
errors.notFound: The requested resource was not found
errors.conflict: This action conflicts with existing data
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
errors.server: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

profile.encouragement365: A whole year! You are unstoppable!

auto.explainer: If you miss a day, a banked freeze is used automatically to keep your streak alive.

pro.gate: Streak freezes are part of Pro.

orbitMcp.title: For Developers
orbitMcp.description: Connect AI tools like Claude to your Orbit account via MCP
orbitMcp.apiKeysDescription: API keys let external tools access your Orbit data on your behalf
orbitMcp.keyNameMaxLength: Key name must be 50 characters or less
orbitMcp.revokeConfirm: Are you sure? Any tools using this key will lose access.
orbitMcp.keyCreatedWarning: Copy this key now. It will not be shown again.
orbitMcp.webInstructions: Connect via claude.ai with automatic OAuth sign-in. No API key needed.
orbitMcp.webStep3: Enter the URL below and click "Add"
orbitMcp.webStep4: Click "Connect" and sign in with your Orbit account
orbitMcp.webNoApiKey: Claude Web uses OAuth. You'll sign in with your Orbit email or Google account. No API key required.
orbitMcp.configInstructions: Add this to your MCP configuration:
orbitMcp.replaceKey: Replace YOUR_API_KEY with the key you created above

versionUpdate.title: Update available
versionUpdate.description: A newer version of Orbit is available. Update now to get the latest fixes and features.

meditation.title: Morning Meditation
meditation.description: 10 minutes of mindfulness to start the day

screenTime.title: Reduce Screen Time
screenTime.description: Keep screen time under 2 hours per day

readBooks.title: Read Books
readBooks.description: Read at least 5 times this week

marathon.title: Run a Marathon
marathon.description: Train for and complete a full marathon

readGoal.title: Read 24 Books
readGoal.description: Read 2 books per month this year

replay.title: Feature Tour
replay.hint: Explore all features with a guided walkthrough

list.title: Your Habits
list.description: This is your daily dashboard. It shows all habits scheduled for today, organized by priority. Completed habits appear with a checkmark.

card.title: Habit Card
card.description: Each habit shows its status, tags, and frequency. Tap the circle to mark it complete, or use the menu for more options like edit, skip, or delete.

tabs.title: View Tabs
tabs.description: Switch between Today (scheduled habits), All (everything), General (always available), and Goals (your long-term targets).

dateNav.title: Date Navigation
dateNav.description: Navigate between days to view past completions or upcoming habits. Tap the arrows or swipe to move between dates.

fab.title: Create New
fab.description: Tap here to create a new habit. Choose from recurring, flexible, general, or one-time tasks. You can also create goals from the Goals tab.

streak.title: Streak Counter
streak.description: Your streak tracks consecutive days where you completed all scheduled habits. Keep it going to earn achievements and build momentum!

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Check reminders, achievement alerts, and updates here. Set up push notifications in settings to never miss a habit.

tab.title: Goals Tab
tab.description: Switch to Goals to see your long-term objectives. Goals give direction to your habits by linking daily actions to bigger targets.

card.title: Goal Card
card.description: Each goal shows its progress bar, deadline, and linked habits. Track your journey from start to completion.

progress.title: Goal Progress
progress.description: Update progress manually or let linked habits auto-track it. The progress bar shows how close you are to your target.

area.title: AI Chat
area.description: Your AI assistant can create, edit, and manage habits using natural language. Just describe what you want and it will handle the rest.

input.title: Chat Input
input.description: Type your message, attach images for context, or use voice input. Ask questions, get insights, or manage your habits conversationally.

suggestions.title: Quick Suggestions
suggestions.description: Tap any suggestion chip to quickly start a conversation. These are common actions to help you get started.

voice.title: Voice Input
voice.description: Speak to log habits or ask questions. Supports multiple languages with automatic speech-to-text conversion.

grid.title: Calendar View
grid.description: See your completion history at a glance. Each day is color-coded based on how many habits you completed.

legend.title: Color Legend
legend.description: Your accent color marks today. A solid dot means every habit was done, a hollow ring means partial completion, and amber marks missed habits. Build a streak of solid days!

monthNav.title: Month Navigation
monthNav.description: Navigate between months to review your long-term consistency. Swipe left or right to move quickly.

day.title: Day Detail
day.description: Tap any day to see which habits were scheduled, completed, or missed. You can also log completions for past days.

streak.title: Streak & Freezes
streak.description: View your current and longest streak. Activate streak freezes to protect your streak on off days (limited per month).

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Customize your experience: language, color scheme, timezone, week start day, push notifications, and more.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.description: View your current plan and manage your subscription. Pro unlocks unlimited habits, AI chat, goals, achievements, and more.

retrospective.title: AI Retrospective
retrospective.description: Get detailed AI analysis of your habit patterns over time. Available for weekly, monthly, quarterly, or yearly periods.

achievements.title: Achievements & Levels
achievements.description: Earn XP and level up as you build habits. Unlock achievements for milestones like streak records, completion rates, and more.

intro.title: Agreement
intro.body: These Terms of Service govern your use of Orbit, a personal habit tracking app. By creating an account or using Orbit, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the app.

provider.title: Who Provides Orbit
provider.body: Orbit is provided by TL SOFTWARE ENGINEERING LTDA (CNPJ 58.429.979/0001-06). Throughout these terms, "we", "us", and "Orbit" refer to this company.

eligibility.title: Eligibility
eligibility.body: You must be at least 13 years old to use Orbit. By using the app you represent that you meet this age requirement and that the information you provide is accurate.

license.title: License & Acceptable Use
license.body: We grant you a personal, non-transferable, revocable license to use Orbit for tracking your own habits. You agree not to misuse the service, reverse engineer it, disrupt it, attempt unauthorized access, or use it to violate any law or the rights of others.

subscription.title: Subscriptions & Billing
subscription.intro: Orbit offers a free tier and a paid Pro subscription billed monthly or yearly through Stripe.
subscription.autoRenew: Paid subscriptions renew automatically at the end of each billing period at the then-current price, unless you cancel before the renewal date.
subscription.cancel: You can cancel at any time from your subscription settings; cancellation is as easy as signing up and takes effect at the end of the current paid period.
subscription.refunds: Except where required by applicable consumer-protection law, payments are non-refundable for partial periods. We will honor refund rights granted by Brazilian consumer law (CDC).

ai.title: AI Features
ai.body: Orbit includes an AI assistant (Astra) powered by third-party providers such as OpenAI. AI output is generated automatically, may be inaccurate or incomplete, and is provided for assistance only. You are responsible for how you act on AI suggestions.

noMedicalAdvice.title: Not Medical or Professional Advice
noMedicalAdvice.body: Orbit and its AI features are for informational and self-organization purposes only. Orbit is not a medical device and does not provide medical, psychological, legal, financial, or other professional advice. Always consult a qualified professional for such matters and never disregard professional advice because of something in the app.

warranty.title: Warranty Disclaimer
warranty.body: Orbit is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, express or implied, to the maximum extent permitted by law. We do not warrant that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or that data will never be lost.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.body: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, we are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of Orbit. Nothing in these terms limits rights that cannot be limited under Brazilian consumer law.

termination.title: Termination
termination.body: You may stop using Orbit and delete your account at any time. We may suspend or terminate access if you violate these terms or use the service in a way that harms Orbit or other users.

governingLaw.title: Governing Law
governingLaw.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the Federative Republic of Brazil, without regard to conflict-of-law rules. Disputes are subject to the courts of Brazil, subject to any mandatory consumer-protection venue rules.

changes.title: Changes to These Terms
changes.body: We may update these terms from time to time. Material changes will be communicated in the app or by email. Continued use after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Questions about these terms? Contact us at contact@useorbit.org.

intro.title: How to Delete Your Orbit Account
intro.body: You can permanently delete your Orbit account and all associated data at any time. You do not need to be signed in on this page to learn how. Deletion is available directly inside the app and by email request.

inApp.title: Delete From Inside the App
inApp.intro: The fastest way to delete your account is from the app:
inApp.step1: 1. Open Orbit and go to the Profile tab.
inApp.step3: 3. We email you a 6-digit confirmation code.
inApp.step4: 4. Enter the code to confirm. Your account is deactivated immediately.

grace.title: 7-Day Grace Period
grace.body: After you confirm deletion, your account is deactivated right away and permanently deleted after a 7-day grace period. Signing in again within those 7 days reactivates your account and cancels the deletion.

webFallback.title: Request Deletion by Email
webFallback.body: If you can no longer access the app, email contact@useorbit.org from the address associated with your account and ask us to delete it. We will verify your identity and process the request.

data.title: What Gets Deleted
data.body: Deletion removes your habits, completion history, goals, tags, AI conversations and memory facts, settings, and account profile. This action is irreversible once the grace period ends.

dataExport.error: We couldn't prepare your export. Please try again.

aiDisclosure.isAiTooltip: Astra is an AI assistant. Responses are generated automatically.
aiDisclosure.notMedicalAdvice: Astra is AI and can be wrong. This is not medical or professional advice.
